executive_summary: Build workflow dispatch failed with HTTP 500 Internal Server Error. No Maven build was executed as the GitHub Actions workflow could not be triggered.

errors.description: GitHub Actions workflow dispatch failed with HTTP 500 Internal Server Error
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 500: Internal Server Error. Failed to run workflow dispatch
errors.root_cause: GitHub API returned 500 error when attempting to dispatch the workflow. This could be due to: 1) Invalid workflow file syntax, 2) Missing or incorrect workflow_dispatch trigger, 3) GitHub API temporary outage, 4) Repository permissions issue, 5) Workflow file not found at specified path
errors.impact: Build cannot be executed. No Maven compilation or tests can run until workflow dispatch is fixed.

steps: 4. Check repository permissions for GitHub Actions

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Workflow dispatch failure logged at attempt-1
compliance_notes.change_control: Requires validation of workflow configuration before retry

next_steps: Validate workflow file exists and has correct syntax
Verify repository settings allow workflow dispatch

recommendations.action: Verify .github/workflows/build.yml file exists and contains valid YAML
recommendations.rationale: Workflow file must exist and be valid for dispatch to succeed

recommendations.action: Add or verify 'workflow_dispatch' trigger in build.yml
recommendations.rationale: Workflow must have workflow_dispatch trigger to be manually dispatched

recommendations.action: Check GitHub Actions permissions in repository settings
recommendations.rationale: Repository must allow GitHub Actions and workflow dispatch

recommendations.action: Validate GitHub token has required scopes (repo, workflow)
recommendations.rationale: Token must have workflow scope to dispatch workflows

audit_log.approval_reason: Critical configuration error preventing build execution
